name: MSSP - OS - MS - 25 - L - Windows Account ID Deleted
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event matches Event ID is any of 4726
when at least 1 events are seen with the same Subject (custom) in 5 minutes
thresholds: when at least 1 events are seen with the same Subject (custom) in 5 minutes
